questions.question_text_full: Which of the following is NOT an amendment made to the Airport Economic Regulatory Authority (AERA) Amendment Act, 2021?

options.text: The government can call any airport a major airport just by notification.
The government will club together profit-making and loss-making airports.
The government can offer airports as a package in PPP mode to the prospective bidders.
A major airport is one which has an annual traffic of minimum 35 lakh passengers.

questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the source, but mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 as per instructions.

warnings: No answer key (green tick) is visible on the provided page for question 50.
